pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java source and target compatibility to version 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Codebase uses Java 21 features (e.g., records, pattern matching) that fail to compile on JDK 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JAXB API dependency required for Java 9+ modules.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.xml.bind classes were removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using them fails with NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JavaMail API dependency required for Java 9+ modules.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.mail classes were removed from the JDK in Java 11; code using them fails with NoClassDefFoundError.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile Java 21 syntax or lack support for newer module structures.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Replace deprecated legacy MongoDB Java driver classes with the modern synchronous driver API.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.why_exists: The legacy classes `com.mongodb.MongoClient` and `com.mongodb.MongoClientURI` are deprecated and removed in newer driver versions; code fails to compile without switching to `com.mongodb.client.MongoClient` and `com.mongodb.client.MongoClients`.

src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.general_idea: Configure explicit CodecRegistry for BSON serialization of custom POJOs.
src/main/Config/MongoConfig.java.why_exists: The new driver requires explicit codec configuration for custom types; without this, serialization of `FormMetadata` and `FormSection` would fail at runtime.

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Replace legacy MongoDB Java Driver 3.x imports with Java Driver 4.x compatible imports.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The legacy `com.mongodb.MongoClient` and `com.mongodb.client.model.Filters` classes are removed or relocated in MongoDB Java Driver 4.x, causing compilation errors.

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Refactor UserController to use Dependency Injection instead of static handlers and direct database access.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The previous static handler pattern and direct `MongoClient` usage are incompatible with the new service-oriented architecture and injected DAOs.
src/main/User/UserController.java.before:
public class UserController {
    public static Handler loginUser = ctx -> { ... MongoClient client = MongoConfig.getMongoClient(); ... }

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Replace inline login logic with a dedicated LoginService.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The inline logic using `Argon2` and direct `MongoCollection` queries is removed and replaced by a service call to adhere to the new architecture.
src/main/User/UserController.java.after:
LoginService loginService = new LoginService(userDao, tokenDao, activityDao, username, password, ip, userAgent);
Message response = loginService.executeAndGetResponse();

src/main/User/UserController.java.general_idea: Replace inline user creation logic with a dedicated CreateUserService.
src/main/User/UserController.java.why_exists: The inline logic for hashing passwords and inserting documents is removed and replaced by a service call.
src/main/User/UserController.java.after:
CreateUserService createUserService = new CreateUserService(...);
Message response = createUserService.executeAndGetResponse();
